transcript.text:
I have 5kg of meat
Who's going to eat all of this?
[Me]
[Is that it?]
[That's manageable]
Our Mansoon can eat more than Tzuyang
[Mansoon]
[I got this]
[Defeat Tzuyang]
This isn't easy
There will be nothing left for us
[With Hanmac beer]
Hanmac is a beer made with rice
The quality is the best
Goes down very smooth
The farmers made this with pride

[With the Sunnchang villagers]
[KBBQ Party] Cheers
[City of Sunchang, Jeollabuk-do Province]
Hello everyone
I am here at Sunchang today
I have some food to go with alcochol
It's about 5kg of meat
I will be drinking some beer with the elderly
This is getting heavy, so let's get going
Heavy!
Hello
You've come a long way
You wait right there
We gotta do what we gotta do
[Self-check]
[This was filmed in compliance with the COVID-19 prevention regulations. Please note that the personnel in this video have been gathered for the purpose of filming, which is part of their work]

[Pass]
You bought a lot of meat Who's going to eat all of this?
I wanted it to be enough for everyone
Chuck flap
What is this?
Pork Belly
Black Pork Belly too
How many days did you starve?
I didn't starve
Give us some
It's for all of us
[Getting ready for the BBQ]
[Organic] These are from the professionals
The Seoul people can't have something this fresh
I guess she made a lot of money She bought a lot of meat
Must be rich

[Food is all prepped]
Who will eat all of it?
My belly will be happy It must be my birthday
It's like we're at a restaurant
Tzuyang, sharing is caring
Looks delicious
How hungry is she? Trying to eat all of that..
Lovely weather
It's good that you're here today The weather the other day was deadly
[Excellent]
Where there is food, there needs to be a drink
Let's drink our rice beer
Do I need to bring it?
[Preparing cold beers]
[Hanmac is here]
[A lot=good]

[With iced glasses]
That knowledge comes with age
Iced-cup is a must
[Hanmac] A lager perfect for Koreans
[100% Korean rice with refreshing flavors]
It's made with rice we produced
We take great pride in it
[Rice produced by eco-friendly farming methods in Sunchang]
[A lager perfectly fit for Koreans because it's brewed with our rice]
This is the rice they use to make this beer
[Rice produced through the efforts of Sunchang farmers]
[Domestic rice that fits the taste of Koreans]
Beer is usually brewed with barley But this is made with rice
Its quality is the best
It goes down very smooth
Are you good at drinking?

Definitely not
Really?
Don't even mention it
[Well, if you insist]
1 more!
[If you insist]
[That's refreshing]
I don't really drink a lot of beer
It's because I don't like the strong bitter taste of beer
But this isn't bitter at all It's very smooth
It does not have a strong taste
Really smooth
Very tasty
Yummy
The best alcohol is Hanmac beer
[Self-compliment]

Looks so juicy
Is that going straight into your mouth?
She definitely starved
No way
[Grilling]
[Eating]
[Taking care of the elders]
[Reminds me of my younger self]
[Satisfied]
No way Where's all of that going?
Your intestines must be 5 meters long
Longer than ours
[1 more Hanmac beer]
Show me 3 pieces
[Satisfied]
Grill some meat for Tzuyang from Seoul if you're done eating

I'm the professional griller
Leave this to me
Go eat, Tzuyang
[Homemade Kimchi]
This taste best when you rip it with your hands
Thank you
Eat a lot!
Thank you
[With some cold beer] Thank you
Are you good at drinking?
[Nope]
Back in my day
Not now?
He would always drink a box
It was always 'go big or go home'
Bottled beer is where it's at!

It's fun to pour the beer out of the bottles
[Popping bottles]
All alcoholics can do that
Let me pour you a glass
Very nice
[inaudible]
Right, I have food in my mouth
Anyways.. Sunchang rice is the best!
There's no pollution here
We have a clean environment
Clean waters, fresh air, friendly villagers
There's no place like Sunchang
This beer tastes better because of its great ingredients
[Everyone promoting Hanmac]
[Drink a glass]
[Amazing]

How's the design?
It's pretty
The can is very pretty Hanmac!
It's the best!
Korea's best lager
It looks ready
Don't overdo yourself
Is she eating all of that?
She's really doing it?
How many is she on? [No one knows]
Will you be okay?
[Tzuyang is still hungry]
[Endless KBBQ]
You're good at this
Why are you doing that?
So it doesn't explode

I didn't know that
Teach us your ways
But are you serious?
It works!
Cheers
[She said she didn't like drinking alcohol]
It's really tasty
Indeed
[Mansoon is on a roll]
You're really good at eating You should do mukbang
If I start, I will have 10 million subscribers
I give up
[Ramyun noodles for dessert] How many do you want?
I'll take 3
Are you eating more?
[Time to digest a little]

[Not even a chip]
Straight down
[Success]
You're good at this
[Let's keep going]
I'm worn out
No more
Thank you
Looks so good
That's a lot
How is she eating more after that?
Bon appetit
Yum
[Plating it with pork belly]
With some pork belly
[With some beer this time]

[Noodles and beer]
[Chase it with a piece of pork belly]
Delicious
The ramyun is so tasty
How will you return to Seoul?
I'm worried
I will digest everything on the way when I nap
[Excellent]
[Last bite]
I'm concerned
Her face is literally this small
I saw her in the morning and she was like a walking chopstick
Thank you for today This isn't much, but here
Thank you
I'm just thankful that you visited us here
Thank you

It's not easy farming rice, right?
Of course
[There's a saying that there needs to be 88 steps to make a single grain of rice]
It's the same for other farmers
We struggled so much last year because of the flood
I know that it's hard, but it's what we do to make the best rice
We are all doing our best
We are thrilled because our rice is being used to brew a great-tasting beer
We send love and support to all the farmers [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
